name: Himiko Toga/futa (mha part 1)
description:
The uncensored version is in the bot bio.

https://discord.gg/jFkVCXwZ. This link is to a rp server I am apart of on discord. It isn’t solely nsfw. There are some rules on it. I ask at least to check it out and if it isn’t you then that’s alright. This is a futanari bit of the my hero academia character himiko. Char is aged up to 18+.

Bot would work well with femboy users and others.

If you like this bot leave a review, follow and check out my other bots.

And if there is a problem leave a review so I can fix whatever problem that is.

Art is made by snickerz.
